address.line1: 桜5丁目21-5 グランドメゾン663

encounters.chief_complaint: Nausea, vomiting, abdominal pain, polyuria, altered consciousness

orders.display_name: IV_fluid: NS 1000mL/h x 1h, then 500mL/h x 4h, then 250mL/h
IV_insulin: Regular insulin 0.1 U/kg/h continuous drip (after K >= 3.3)
K_replacement: KCl 20-40 mEq/L in IV fluids, target K 4.0-5.0
I_and_O: Strict intake and output monitoring
DVT_prophylaxis: Enoxaparin 2000IU SC daily (once hemodynamically stable)

vital_signs.nursing_note: SpO2 low, O2 adjusted. improving, appetite good.
